name: io.github.sai4447/agentfuse-mcp
description: Affiliate API for AI agents -- browse programs, generate tracked links, record conversions.

environmentVariables.name: AGENTFUSE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your AgentFuse API key (get one at agentfuse.io). Format: af_live_...

environmentVariables.name: AGENTFUSE_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: AgentFuse API base URL. Defaults to https://api.agentfuse.io
